label: Brandon Road Project to block invasive carp

comments.text: Today, Illinois marks a milestone in the Brandon Road Interbasin Project with the acquisition of the land needed for construction. Thanks to Midwest Generation for their partnership, the millions in the Great Lakes region who rely on this ecosystem will continue to be protected.

This project right here is the last line of defense, near Joliet IL, the only thing stopping invasive carp from getting into the Great Lakes and beyond. And, as I mentioned, the project's on hold due to uncertainty about funding from Trump. Anyways, hope you've all developed a fun new fear!

Stop the live fish pathway. Do not buy, sell, possess, transport, or release live invasive carp. If you see or catch a suspected invasive carp, take photos if safe, note the location/date, and report it: eddmaps.org #InvasiveCarp #GreatLakes #Fishing #Ontario

Prevention is the easier option. In 2025, U.S. crews removed 7M+ lb of invasive carp from the Illinois River. Canada still has a prevention window. Clean, drain, dry. Never move live fish. Report: EDDMapS.org Learn more: InvasiveCarp.ca #InvasiveCarp #GreatLakes #Ontario #Fishing
